reviews.text: I booked in for a scan over the phone and agreed to £195 for the appointment. 2 days before, I received a call to say they couldn’t do the scan because I was booked in with a consultant who scans under 12 weeks and I’m further along. That …

I am extremely shaken by my recent experience. During my visit, I had an ultrasound that I believed I had prepaid for, as I had done with other treatments there. Before receiving my results, during the checkout process, I was unable to pay …
